chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-964 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.10.2024 Mr. Jehanzaib @ Jansher Memon advocate along with applicant. Mr. Abdul Majeed Magsi advocate along with complainant. His vakalatnama is taken on record. Mr. Shawak Rathore, D.P.G. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J.- Through this bail the applicant seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.227/2024 registered at P.S. Tando Muhammad Khan U/s 324, 114, 147, 148, 149, 506/2, 337-H, 504 PPC after his bail was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-I Tando Muhammad Khan vide order dated 30.08.2024. 2. The contents of FIR need not to be reproduced as the same are already mentioned in the memo of bail application. 3. Both the parties submit that they have patched up their dispute and since the case has not been challaned, therefore, they are unable to file compromise application before the trial court and complainant along with his counsel has raised no objection to the confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail. In view of their compromise, learned DPG also conceded for confirmation of bail. 4. Under such circumstances, the bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 02.09.2024 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Ali Haider
